---
id: add-virtual-device
title: "添加虚拟设备"
description: "添加一个红外类型或灯箱类型的虚拟设备。"
sidebar_label: "添加虚拟设备"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"添加虚拟设备"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/virtual-devices"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



添加一个红外类型或灯箱类型的虚拟设备。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["name","virtualDeviceType"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"虚拟设备名称。"},"virtualDeviceType":{"type":"string","enum":["ir","lightbox"],"description":"虚拟设备类型。<br />`ir` ：红外设备。<br />`lightbox` ：灯箱设备。"}},"title":"VirtualDeviceAddRequest"},"examples":{"addIrVirtualDevice":{"value":{"name":"Living Room IR Remote","virtualDeviceType":"ir"}},"addLightboxVirtualDevice":{"value":{"name":"Living Room Lightbox","virtualDeviceType":"lightbox"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
